title: Sour Australian Lamb Grill
description: A bold and tangy lamb dish featuring bay leaves, served with a velvety sauce.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt and pepper.
Place the lamb on the grill and cook for 45 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the grill and set aside to rest.
In a large pan, combine 2 tablespoons of olive oil and 2 cloves of minced garlic.
Add 1 cup of red wine vinegar to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Add 1 cup of lamb stock to the pan and continue to simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in 2 tablespoons of honey and 1 tablespoon of Dijon mustard.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Use an immersion blender to puree the sauce until smooth.
Strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl.
Discard the solids and let the sauce cool to room temperature.
To serve, slice the lamb into thin strips and serve with the cooled sauce.
Garnish with fresh bay leaves and serve immediately.
